head_commit.message:
feat: Add N-gram Transformer and associated tests

- Implemented N-gram Transformer in `text-to-qp-transformer.js` to convert English text into sequences of Wikidata entities and properties with disambiguation support.
- Created a test suite for the transformer in `text-transformer-test.js`, covering various scenarios including multi-word entities and stop words filtering.
- Developed an HTML test interface in `test-ngram.html` to visually run and display results of the transformer tests.
- Enhanced caching mechanism in `unified-cache.js` to use a dynamic data directory for storing cached results.

head_commit.message:
Add browser-specific caching and API utilities

- Implement unified caching system for browser environments with IndexedDB and memory caching.
- Create BrowserCacheFactory for dynamic cache type creation.
- Develop WikidataAPIClient for handling API interactions with configurable caching.
- Introduce WikidataSearchUtility for enhanced search functionality.
- Add browser cache test HTML file to validate caching behavior and API interactions.
- Update text-to-Q/P transformer to support both browser and Node.js environments.
- Modify entities.html to utilize the new browser API utilities.

head_commit.message:
Add limitation testing suite and persistent caching system

- Implemented a comprehensive limitation testing suite in `limitation-test.mjs` to identify transformer weaknesses with various edge cases.
- Created a mock API for testing purposes, simulating responses for standard cases, abstract concepts, ambiguous terms, and more.
- Developed a persistent file-based caching system in `persistent-cache.js` to store and manage API responses, enhancing performance and reducing redundant requests.
- Generated a report of identified issues and failures during testing, saved in `limitations-found.json`.
- Added functionality for cache management, including TTL, memory caching, and file-based storage.

head_commit.message:
Add Text to Wikidata Q/P Transformer with test suite and demo

- Implemented TextToQPTransformer class for transforming English text into Wikidata Q/P sequences.
- Created run-tests.html for a test suite interface with buttons to run all tests, specific feature tests, performance tests, and a demo.
- Developed text-transformer-demo.html for user interaction, allowing input text transformation with options for including labels and preferring properties.
- Established automated test suite in text-transformer-test.js to validate transformer functionality with various test cases and performance benchmarks.
- Added detailed analysis and results display in the demo interface, including token breakdown and sequence statistics.

head_commit.message:
Add WikidataSearchUtility class for enhanced search functionality

Implement searchExactMatch and searchFuzzy methods for precise and flexible entity and property searches. Introduce disambiguateSearch for combining exact and fuzzy results, and add context-aware ranking capabilities with rankByDomain and rankByType methods. Update exports to include the new search utility instance for improved integration.
